title: Databricks Runtime 17.3 LTS is now GA
body: Databricks Runtime 17.3 LTS is now generally available. See [Databricks Runtime 17.3 LTS](/aws/en/release-notes/runtime/17.3lts) and [Databricks Runtime 17.3 LTS for Machine Learning](/aws/en/release-notes/runtime/17.3lts-ml).

ref_links.text: Databricks Runtime 17.3 LTS for Machine Learning
